name: facebook_pages_scraper
title: Facebook Pages Scraper
description: Extract public Facebook Page Plugin metadata from one or more page URLs or slugs, including page name, Facebook URL, numeric ID, follower count, verification label, intro text, and profile image when visible.

seo.title: Facebook Pages Scraper Tool for Public Page Metadata
seo.description: Scrape public Facebook Page Plugin metadata with Better Fetch, including page names, canonical Facebook URLs, numeric IDs, follower counts, verification labels, intro text, and profile images.
seo.intro: Facebook Pages Scraper gives agents a validated no-login slice of public Facebook Page research. Provide a Facebook Page URL, slug, or small batch of URLs and the tool renders Facebook's public Page Plugin, then normalizes the visible page header into compact records with page name, canonical Facebook URL, numeric page ID, follower count, verification label, intro text when exposed, profile image URL, and source URL. It is built for lightweight lead enrichment, brand monitoring, page identity checks, and social-media research where public Page Plugin metadata is enough.

useCases.title: Page identity checks
useCases.description: Verify that a Facebook Page URL resolves to the expected public name, canonical Facebook URL, numeric page ID, visible follower count, and profile image.

useCases.title: Social lead enrichment
useCases.description: Add public Facebook Page names, follower counts, profile images, and intro text to lead or brand records without maintaining a Facebook login session.

useCases.title: Brand monitoring
useCases.description: Track public Page follower-count signals and canonical IDs for official pages before a workflow runs deeper social listening or campaign analysis.

faqs.question: Does Facebook Pages Scraper need a Facebook login?
faqs.answer: No. Version 0.1 uses Facebook's public Page Plugin through Better Fetch and only returns metadata visible through that public embed surface.

faqs.question: Does it return email, address, phone, reviews, or ads status?
faqs.answer: Not in this first slice. Version 0.1 is intentionally limited to Page Plugin-visible page header metadata and does not use cookies, private Graph API tokens, or authenticated Facebook pages.

faqs.question: Why do some pages return fewer fields?
faqs.answer: Facebook controls what the Page Plugin exposes. Restricted, unsupported, unavailable, or layout-shifted pages may expose only a subset of page name, follower count, image, intro, and canonical URL.

page_url.description: Single public Facebook Page URL, e.g. https://www.facebook.com/NASA. Use page_url, page_slug, or page_urls.

page_slug.description: Single Facebook Page slug, numeric page ID, or simple page path, e.g. NASA. Use page_url, page_slug, or page_urls.

page_urls.description: Optional batch of up to five Facebook Page URLs, slugs, or numeric page IDs.

wait_ms.description: Extra milliseconds to wait after the Page Plugin loads.

count.description: Number of returned public page records

pages.description: Public Facebook Page metadata records visible in the Page Plugin

input.description: Input URL or slug used for this record

facebook_id.description: Numeric Facebook Page ID when visible

verified.description: Whether the visible plugin text marks the page as verified

intro.description: Short public intro text when visible
